summary: RunPod card-dropdown RAM shows global floor (29GB) not per-DC value (62GB on EU-RO-1, matches user's 57GB Pod). Root cause: lowestPrice input lacks dataCenterId + secureCloud. Fix proven live via probe.

Approach A chosen (re-query per DC). Files claimed: runpodRemote.js (clean) + MpiSettings.js (SHARED with MPI-73, soft claim). Code gated on MPI-73 commit + cross-agent scope agreement. No code written yet.

Implemented per-DC lowestPrice (dataCenterId+secureCloud:true) in gpuTypes/availability/route + frontend _availabilityUrl threading on load/open/DC-change. User-verified live: A4500 EU-RO-1 now shows 62GB RAM (was 29GB global floor); stock also resolves to LOW (was N/A).
User-approved close after live verification. maturity -> complete.
